note: Pick-a-word across languages. ONE prompt -- the census's headline 'any_word' -- asked in 21 languages, to test whether the field collapses onto a single word in every language, and whether it is the same word (translated/borrowed) or a culturally different one. English serendipity, Spanish sol, Hindi jeevan are the seed data points. Scene id IS the language code; the prompt is that language's rendering of 'Pick a word. Reply with one word only.' Reply is elicited in-language by the prompt. Normalization is script-aware, keyed by scene id (see pickword.py). 10 Indian languages across 8 scripts (Devanagari, Bengali, Gurmukhi, Gujarati, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Arabic for Urdu) + 10 international + English baseline.

turns: Pick a word. Reply with one word only.

ஒரு வார்த்தையைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும். ஒரே ஒரு வார்த்தையில் பதிலளிக்கவும்.
